subject: fix(export): restore PNG for PDF export to preserve transparency
body:
Reverts JPEG-based PDF capture back to PNG to preserve transparency.
Uses pixelRatio:2 (sharp enough for downscaling) with jsPDF deflate
compression ('FAST') for reasonable file sizes. The JPEG approach
silently dropped alpha channel support which was not approved.

Also caps pixel ratio dynamically at ~16M pixels to prevent memory
crashes on large formats (YouTube Banner etc.).

Tags: export, pdf
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pdf-export
Semver: patch
